title: Block Manifest
description: #89 Item 7 block manifest (spec docs/design/2026-06-10-390-diff-patch-revision-mode-spec.md §3.1). Machine-generated sidecar emitted by scripts/ars_anchorize_draft.py beside the anchored draft (<draft>.block-manifest.json) and included in the writer's revision-invocation context. It is the ONLY legitimate hash source for a patch document: the writer copies base_draft_hash and per-op old_hash values from here, never computes them (Bucket A agents have all Bash denied, #134; an LLM asked to emit a SHA-256 would hallucinate one). Sidecar artifact, NOT a passport field (§6).

base_draft_hash.description: First 12 hex chars of SHA-256 over the anchored draft's raw bytes.

blocks.description: One entry per block, in document order.

old_hash.description: First 12 hex chars of SHA-256 over the block's normalized text (§3.2 normalization; marker line excluded).

first_line_excerpt.description: First content line (truncated) so the writer can sanity-check it is naming the block it thinks it is.
